description: Small labelled element with Soft, Filled, and Outlined variants, optional icon, removable close button, clickable/selectable states, custom color via CSS variable, and two sizes.

examples.title: Clickable chip with icon and custom color
examples.code:
<TmChip Label="Priority: High"
        Icon="flag"
        Color="#ef4444"
        Variant="ChipVariant.Filled"
        Clickable="true"
        Selected="@isSelected"
        OnClick="ToggleSelection" />
